events.name: New York Knicks at Boston Celtics

headlines.description: — The Knicks grew accustomed to facing big deficits against the Celtics this season.
headlines.shortLinkText: Knicks come from 20 down, beat Celtics 108-105 in OT as Bridges' steal preserves Game 1 win

events.name: Denver Nuggets at Oklahoma City Thunder

headlines.description: — Nikola Jokic showed why he's a finalist for another MVP award with his historic stat line. But with Game 1 of the Western Conference semifinals at stake, the ball again found Aaron Gordon's hands.
headlines.shortLinkText: Gordon's game-winner, Jokic's 42 points, 22 rebounds lead Nuggets past Thunder in West semis Game 1
